headline: What Vistra (VST)'s New Role Powering KKR–Nvidia Helix AI Data Centers Means For Shareholders
summary: In recent days, KKR announced the launch of Helix Digital Infrastructure, a more than US$10.00 billion AI-focused venture backed by Nvidia and the Kuwait Investment Authority, with Vistra named as Helix’s preferred power provider under the leadership of former AWS CEO Adam Selipsky. This partnership positions Vistra at the center of efforts to solve the power bottleneck for hyperscale AI data centers by tightly integrating electricity supply with future data center build-outs. We’ll now...

headline: Why the future of data centers may be in space
summary: Melius Research Managing Director and Head of Energy and Power Research James West joins Julie Hyman to discuss the growing case for data centers in space following the SpaceX (SPCX) IPO and the company's unveiling of its first orbital data center.

raw.headline: Why the future of data centers may be in space

headline: Data Center Boom Fuels Renewables Deals; AI Drives Corporate Venture Investment
summary: Private equity investment in US renewables rose sharply in 2025 as the energy sector raced to keep up with soaring power demand from data centers.

headline: Opportunities And Risks In The AI Ecosystem
summary: Invest in the AI boom like the 1990s internet cycle: VST and GOOG look attractive, while INTC and MU seem overvalued. See more analysis here.

headline: Can KKR Outmaneuver One of the Biggest AI Infrastructure Bottlenecks?
summary: The big money firm is teaming up with Nvidia, Kuwait's sovereign wealth fund, and Texas energy producer Vistra to build data centers.
